sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ كُلُّ الْأَعْمَالِ الصَّالِحَةِ بِالنِّيَّةِ الصَّادِقَةِ لِلَّهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Sva dobra djela počinju s iskrenim nijjetom (namjerom) radi Allaha Uzvišenog.
sentences.translationEn: All righteous deeds begin with a sincere intention for Allah the Almighty.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، رَقْمُ ١].
sentences.translation: Omer ibn el-Hattab, radijallahu anhu, rekao je: Čuo sam Allahovog Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, kako kaže: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama' [Buhari, Knjiga o početku objave, br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: Umar ibn al-Khattab, may Allah be pleased with him, said: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying: 'Actions are but by intentions' [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation, No. 1].

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ أَنَّ قَبُولَ الْعَمَلِ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى مَا فِي قَلْبِ الْمُسْلِمِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis znači da primanje djela zavisi od onoga što je u srcu muslimana.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith means that the acceptance of an action depends on what is in the Muslim's heart.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نُخْلِصَ النِّيَّةَ فِي الصَّلَاةِ وَالصَّدَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga moramo biti iskreni u namjeri tokom namaza i udjeljivanja sadake.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we must be sincere in our intention during prayer and charity.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْإِخْلَاصُ يَجْعَلُ الْإِنْسَانَ يَنَالُ الْأَجْرَ الْعَظِيمَ مِنَ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Ta iskrenost omogućava čovjeku da dobije veliku nagradu od Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: This sincerity allows a person to receive a great reward from Allah.
